full_name_en: Régie des alcools, des courses et des jeux
full_name_fr: Régie des alcools, des courses et des jeux
description_en: The RACJ issues permits for the sale and service of alcoholic beverages in Quebec, as well as permits for gaming and horse racing activities.
description_fr: La RACJ émet les permis pour la vente et le service de boissons alcooliques au Québec, ainsi que les permis liés aux jeux et aux courses.

alcohol_permits.description_en: Allows serving alcohol for consumption on-site alongside meals
Allows serving alcohol for consumption on-site, with or without food
Allows sale of beer and cider for off-site consumption
Temporary permit for one-time events where alcohol will be served

application_requirements_en: Criminal background check for permit holders
Proof of responsible service of alcohol training (Éduc'alcool)
